_note: Updated 2026-03-16. NetSuite selected 2026-02-26. The March 5 NetSuite package is now archived in-repo and under review. Commercial decisions are still open because scope, add-ons, and delivery model are not final.

selectionDecision.eliminationReason: SAP proposal raised concerns on RACI clarity, governance model, and PMO sufficiency.

commercialStatus.note: NetSuite commercial package was received on 2026-03-05 and archived in vendor-assets. The current question is not whether a package exists, but which parts of it are truly required for phase 1 and who should lead delivery.
openDecisions: Phase 1 boundary: keep Jan 1, 2027 scope to core finance / P2P / controls or include O2C and inventory now.
Which license counts and add-ons are truly required on day 1 vs defer / remove.
Implementation lead: NetSuite directly or alternative SI.
KPMG implementation support scope: governance overlay only or broader AMOA package.
Who owns contract redlines and final negotiation cadence (Hema / Mike / Legal).

sapOfferArchive._note: SAP offer retained for reference only. SAP was eliminated 2026-02-26.

keyNumbers.label: NetSuite year 1 with travel + optional add-ons
